name: ExtensionImplementationGuide_DependsOn_Reason
title: R5: Why dependency exists (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImplementationGuide.dependsOn.reason` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImplementationGuide.dependsOn.reason` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImplementationGuide.dependsOn.reason` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImplementationGuide.dependsOn.reason` has a context of ImplementationGuide.dependsOn based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ImplementationGuide`.
Element `ImplementationGuide.dependsOn.reason` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `ImplementationGuide.dependsOn.reason` has a context of ImplementationGuide.dependsOn based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ImplementationGuide`.
Element `ImplementationGuide.dependsOn.reason` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This doesn't need to enumerate every resource used, but should give some sense of why the dependency exists.  It will be used in the rendered list of dependencies

element.definition: A description explaining the nature of the dependency on the listed IG.
element.comment: This doesn't need to enumerate every resource used, but should give some sense of why the dependency exists.  It will be used in the rendered list of dependencies
